title: ThermoSafe – Heat Risk 🌞
alert_extreme: 🚨 EXTREME heat risk! Avoid physical effort and stay hydrated!
error_data: Could not retrieve data for this location.
day_mild: Take breaks in the shade every hour.
day_moderate: Avoid intense physical effort at midday.
day_high: Avoid working under direct sunlight if possible.
Take 20-minute breaks in the shade regularly.
Wear light clothing, use a hat, stay well hydrated.
Alert supervisors if dizziness or cramps appear.
day_extreme: Stop the activity if possible and seek a cool place.
Drink water constantly, even if not thirsty.
Alert someone immediately if feeling unwell, disoriented or with dry skin.
Contact emergency services if serious symptoms appear.
night_safe: Safe night conditions. Ensure good ventilation.
night_moderate: Warm night: open windows or ventilate the room.
night_extreme: 🌡️ Hot night: avoid effort and rest in a cool place.
night_water: Drink water before going to sleep.
night_heavy_meal: Avoid heavy meals and stay hydrated.
night_emergency: Avoid any physical effort. Seek medical help immediately if you have serious symptoms.
